title: IHLD MedTech raises US$3 million from UltraGreen.ai in strategic investment
summary: IHLD MedTech has closed a strategic investment from UltraGreen.ai (SGX: ULG), a Singapore Exchange-listed global leader in fluorescence-guided surgery and digital health solutions operating across 54 countries and valued at […]
contentHtml:
SGX-listed UltraGreen.ai, valued at US$1.3 billion, backs iLiveConnect and WoundHeal+ with deal structured for up to US$12 million as platforms expand across India.

IHLD MedTech has closed a strategic investment from UltraGreen.ai (SGX: ULG), a Singapore Exchange-listed global leader in fluorescence-guided surgery and digital health solutions operating across 54 countries and valued at approximately US$1.3 billion.

The investment comprises an initial tranche of US$3 million, with a total commitment potential of US$12 million, to fuel the expansion of IHLD MedTech’s two AI-powered healthcare platforms across India and international markets.

IHLD MedTech is building two platforms at the intersection of clinical medicine and technology, addressing chronic disease, preventable hospitalisations, and non-healing wounds – conditions that collectively affect hundreds of millions of patients and cost India’s healthcare system billions of dollars annually.

iLiveConnect is India’s first AI-enabled, Doctors-led continuous care platform, delivering real-time health monitoring, clinical oversight, and care continuity for patients managing chronic diseases, post-discharge recovery, preventive health needs, and elderly care. Backed by a 24×7 Clinical Command Centre staffed by specialist physicians, iLiveConnect moves care from episodic clinic visits to continuous, connected monitoring across every hour of a patient’s life.

WoundHeal+ is India’s most advanced wound management clinic chain, integrating fluorescence imaging, AI-assisted perfusion assessment, and data-driven clinical decision support to improve outcomes in diabetic foot ulcers, pressure injuries, surgical wounds, and complex chronic wounds. With nearly 80% of India’s 100,000 annual lower limb amputations linked to diabetes, and most preventable with timely wound intervention, WoundHeal+ addresses one of the country’s most urgent and underserved clinical needs.

The partnership brings together UltraGreen.ai’s global expertise in advanced fluorescence imaging and digital health technologies with IHLD MedTech’s innovative care delivery ecosystem. India’s healthtech market is one of the fastest-growing globally, with the digital health segment projected to grow at over 25% CAGR through 2033, driven by AI adoption, chronic disease burden, and the expanding need for remote patient monitoring. IHLD MedTech’s platforms are built for precisely this inflection point.

Ravinder Sajwan, CEO, UltraGreen.ai, commented, “The future of healthcare lies at the intersection of advanced technology, clinical intelligence, and continuous patient engagement. iLiveConnect and WoundHeal+ represent innovative approaches to two of healthcare’s most pressing global challenges. We are pleased to support IHLD MedTech’s next phase of growth and look forward to combining our capabilities to deliver measurably better patient outcomes.”

Dr Rahul Chandola, Founder and Managing Director, IHLD MedTech, commented, “Healthcare systems are failing patients in the spaces between clinical encounters, in recovery, in chronic disease, in wounds that do not heal. iLiveConnect and WoundHeal+ were built to close those gaps with technology that thinks continuously and clinicians who are always on. This partnership with UltraGreen.ai gives us the technology depth, global reach, and capital to scale both platforms meaningfully across India and into international markets.”
